C[pablo_abc: Sorry Ivana don't understand that   ""(only difference when playing online)..."" what do you mean ? I heard about the dames because we must count the stones at the end...but  what else I'm missing?

ivana: when you play irl with chinese rules, you are filling territories with prisoners and with stones from the bowl too (you need to have equal number of stones in both bowles), and then count left territory
ivana: not need to, but it is easier to count that way, than to count all the stones on the board
